texto: A good shepherd always gives people freedom to choose
autor: he doesn’t lay down conditions or use any kind of pretext to restrict people. This shepherd resembles Jesus and people will not even want to leave him.
explicacao: Citação de he doesn’t lay down conditions or use any kind of pretext to restrict people. This shepherd resembles Jesus and people will not even want to leave him. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “A good shepherd always gives people freedom to choose” articula reflexao, pastor-adelaja-sunday, shepherd em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
